prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `2a28add5`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `2a28add5`. The rule is: on each row containing a `6`, collapse that row’s non-`7` cells into one contiguous horizontal run of `8`s on the same row, preserving the `6`’s ordinal position within the row. I discarded the Sonnet hint and corrected the Opus hint: Sonnet invented cluster bounding boxes, and Opus missed that the run is not simply the full leftmost-to-rightmost span.

The verifier is in [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2a28add5/verifier.py#L4), the constructive generator is in [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2a28add5/generator.py#L4), package wiring is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2a28add5/__init__.py#L1), and the hint correction is documented in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2a28add5/notes.md#L1). No new primitive was needed. The generator matches the task family by keeping fixed 10x10 `7`-background grids, sparse multicolor row noise, a handful of active rows each with exactly one `6`, and output runs whose lengths and border-touching behavior come from the same left/right non-background counts as the official task.

Validation passed end to end: official examples `3/3`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and the preview sheet looked on-family. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2a28add5/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2a28add5/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2a28add5/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2a28add5/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2a28add5/previews/preview_03.png).
